arts.ttl: Liverpool 'win' transfer battle against Newcastle United for Premier League centre-back as Virgil van Dijk exit looms
arts.sum: Liverpool are ahead of Newcastle United in the race to sign a Premier League centre-back in the summer transfer window amidst uncertainty regarding Virgil van Dijk.

arts.ttl: Last chance for Darwin Núñez to turn laughter into legacy at Liverpool
arts.sum: Carabao Cup final offers Liverpool’s entertaining and erratic forward a chance to write himself into club folklore The prevailing sensation while watching El Chavo del Ocho is to wonder how this thing ever got made in the first place. It’s a low-budget Mexican sitcom that ran from the 70s to the 90s, centred on an eight-year-old orphan who lives in a barrel in an apartment complex. The boy is played by Roberto Gómez Bolaños, who was in his 40s when the series began and his 60s when it ended. Pretty much all the humour is derived from slapstick: situational farce, physical jokes, people getting their heads trapped in buckets. That kind of thing. Try to imagine ChuckleVision gone global, to the point where it was a genuine cultural touchstone for hundreds of millions, to the point where Paul and Barry Chuckle have a star on the Hollywood Walk of Fame and are unable to walk through Manhattan without being mobbed. That’s El Chavo. Even today it remains one of the most famous comic creations in the history of television: syndicated across the Americas, enthralling successive generations long after it was decommissioned. Including – at some point in early 2000s Uruguay – a young Darwin Núñez. Continue reading...

arts.ttl: Newcastle captain Bruno Guimaraes hopes to make good on promise he made to fans
arts.sum: Newcastle United take on Liverpool in the Carabao Cup final at Wembley on Sunday afternoon and Magpies captain Bruno Guimaraes is dreaming of lifting the trophy

arts.ttl: Newcastle receive boost in their efforts to keep key star amid transfer rumours
arts.sum: Bruno Guimaraes will not push for a move away from Newcastle United despite interest from rivals. The Brazilian international’s future has been a massive talking point in recent weeks. While there is still over three years left on his deal at the Tyneside club, he has been linked with a move away. arts.ttl: Liverpool transfer news update: Summer window latest as Reds 'interested' in ex-Manchester City attacker to replace Darwin Nunez
arts.sum: The agent of an ex-Manchester City attacker claims that Liverpool held interest in signing the forward last summer and refuses to rule out the possibility of a move.

arts.ttl: ‘Possibly’: Glenn Murray says £75m Liverpool player could really struggle vs Newcastle tomorrow
arts.sum: Liverpool and Newcastle face off in the Carabao Cup final on Sunday in what could be a very tight game. Paul Merson reckons this game...

arts.ttl: Report: The three centre-backs Liverpool wish to replace Van Dijk with
arts.sum: Liverpool are keeping their options open in case Virgil van Dijk leaves on a free transfer this summer, with three defenders reportedly on their radar. According to Christian Falk, the Reds are considering Nico Schlotterbeck, Marc Guehi, and Konstantinos Koulierakis as possible replacements for their captain. arts.ttl: Virgil van Dijk made me realise what I did for Liverpool - my God, what an achievement
arts.sum: EXCLUSIVE: Former Liverpool captain Jamie Redknapp chats to the ECHO to preview Sunday's Carabao Cup final against Newcastle United

arts.ttl: Liverpool star details 'amazing' Arne Slot admission before Carabao Cup final
arts.sum: CARABAO CUP FINAL: Wataru Endo has found minutes hard to come by for Liverpool this season but he has been a prominent figure throughout their League Cup campaign as he looks to help the Reds retain the trophy against Newcastle at Wembley

arts.ttl: This is no Mickey Mouse Cup - the Carabao Cup final is special for Liverpool and Newcastle
arts.sum: From milk to an energy drink, this competition has had plenty of sponsors but has never been given the kudos it deserves - that might change as an epic Wembley showdown beckons
